items.note: Saka trained individually on Thursday and was rested by Arteta for GW38 vs Crystal Palace ahead of Arsenal's UCL final vs PSG in Budapest. Confirmed benched — did not start. High ownership implosion risk for anyone holding him as a starter.

Arsenal rotated widely for GW38 with the UCL final in mind. Arteta's predicted XI vs Crystal Palace featured Hincapie and Mosquera at CB, omitting Gabriel from some predicted lineups. His participation is uncertain — treat as rotation risk until confirmed team news.
Rice retained in Arsenal's predicted GW38 XI despite rotation elsewhere. Considered too important to rest even with the UCL final imminent. No injury concern in news.json.

Haaland predicted to start and lead the line vs Aston Villa at home. Described as standout GW38 captain by multiple sources. Pep Guardiola's final game adds motivation narrative — no rotation risk flagged by FPL experts. Gemini also names him captain with 14 xPts projection.

Bowen starts for West Ham vs Leeds in a potential relegation six-pointer. Named in predicted XI. Most transferred-in player for GW38 (134k+). Also on penalties. Strong motivation to play full 90 minutes.

Bruno Fernandes starts vs Brighton in the no.10 role. Sitting on 20 assists and tied for the single-season PL record — strong personal motivation to play and set the record outright. Named in predicted XI.
Verbruggen named in Brighton's predicted GW38 XI vs Man United. No rotation concern or injury flagged.
Anderson named in Nottingham Forest's predicted GW38 XI. No rotation or injury concern flagged.
Thiaw expected to start for Newcastle in GW38. No injury in news.json. Named in Newcastle's predicted XI. Has been described as imperious for Newcastle in recent form.
Igor Thiago named as starter in Brentford's predicted GW38 XI. No injury in news.json. Brentford have no cup obligations — low rotation risk.
Ugarte starts ahead of Casemiro in Man United's midfield vs Brighton. Predicted Man United XI explicitly replaces Casemiro with Ugarte. Bench asset only.
No GW38-specific lineup data found for Hill or Bournemouth. No injury in news.json. Treat as likely starts but verify against official pre-match team news.
Burnley bench GK. Burnley are relegated — end-of-season rotation possible. No injury flagged. Bench asset so minimal starting XI impact regardless.
Bench DEF at Man City. City go strong vs Villa (Guardiola's farewell) — O'Reilly unlikely to start ahead of first-choice CB pairing. Bench asset only.

Bench DEF at Crystal Palace hosting Arsenal. No GW38-specific data for Canvot. Palace have Conference League final the following week — some rotation possible but Canvot's starting status unclear. Bench asset.
